{{Quote|H.O.P.E. Squad-- High Orbit Precision Entry. When speed and stealth are essential. We specialise in insertion and extraction.|[[Unidentified orange commando|H.O.P.E. Squad's Sergeant]] explaining his squads specialities|<ref name="CWA">{{CWACite|6|The Drop (comic story)}}</ref>}}
'''H.O.P.E. (High Orbit Precision Entry) Squad''' was a four man [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of specialized [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. They wore [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|Katarn commando armor]] painted in various color schemes and could be deployed in specialized [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]] from an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]]. They acted on orders received from the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]].<ref name="CWA" />

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Jedi Council tasked H.O.P.E. with [[Mission to Yorn Skot|aiding]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Treetower]] on [[Yorn Skot]], where the Jedi was attempting to free [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] slaves being [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] to the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. Treetower had been attacked and knocked off a platform, but his [[Clothing/Legends|robes]] caught on a unipod at the bottom of the platform. H.O.P.E. Squad was dispatched shortly afterwards from an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]], deploying with [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]] and [[Combat Umbrella]]s. The platform was guarded by two [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|spider droids]], but both were dispatched by the commandos. When the squad attempted to rappel down the platform's side, all of them except for the squad [[Unidentified orange commando|leader]] were killed. The mission, however, ended in success.<ref name="CWA" /> With the stress of the war affecting citizens in 19 BBY, H.O.P.E. Squad acted as a police force in a riot against the Jedi on the planet of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], a central hub of the Galactic Republic and home to the Jedi Temple. With many riots and uprisings occurring on the planet during the Clone Wars, H.O.P.E. Squad was called upon to restore order to the affected areas and to ensure the safety of the Jedi because the Temple Guard was spread thin. Despite the challenging circumstances, the squad's specialized skills and training allowed the commandos to successfully complete their mission. In many instances H.O.P.E. worked in co-operation with [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Police]] and [[Coruscant Guard/Legends|Coruscant Guard]] forces to arrest and bring justice upon local [[Anti-Jedi sentiment/Legends|Anti-Jedi]] terrorists.
